title: 🎇 Phanta's Scythes 🎇
body:
# Phanta's Scythes
i've been testing Doctor4t's Arsenal mods recently, and i really like Scythes, so i decided to make this pack :)

all axes types have been replaced by Scythes

# in Game Showcase

![demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QFKJg5PT/images/941d0b5f45d4bb8fe8fd5691c6d8187f6710c663.png)
